hero.heading: Strategic counsel.
hero.introduction: A premier commercial law firm offering strategic legal advisory and dispute resolution to growth-oriented enterprises, multinational corporations, and industry leaders.

firm.heading: Legal excellence shaped by
firm.paragraphOne: KDH Advocates LLP, formerly Ken, Daniel & Henry Advocates, combines legal excellence with commercial insight to deliver tailored solutions aligned with each client's strategic objectives.
firm.paragraphTwo: Every matter is treated with the utmost diligence and intellectual rigour. We see legal challenges not merely as problems to be solved, but as opportunities to advance and safeguard our clients' business interests.

contact.heading: Your next move deserves
contact.introduction: We prioritise a face-to-face first consultation so that we can understand your concerns, objectives, and instructions in full.
contact.office: IPS Building, 1st Floor, Kimathi Street, Nairobi
